title: Drunken Master Su Qier
overview: The story is about Su Can, a cynical and young man from a family of officials. During the Gunsmoke Conference, his father, Su Gui, was assassinated by Suo Tu's party and almost died, which led to Su Chan's grudge against Suo Tu and his acquaintance with Liu Gong, the leader of the Beggar's Gang.
